IS_STRING: The {property} field must be a string.
IS_EMAIL: The {property} field must be a valid email address.
IS_STRONG_PASSWORD: The {property} field must be a strong password (at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol).
IS_ENUM: The {property} field has an invalid value.
IS_ARRAY: The {property} field must be an array.
IS_UUID: The {property} field must be a valid UUID.
